subcodes.first_line: O thou who art immersed in the sea of God's love! Upon thee be the outpourings of the Supreme Concourse and the rains of grace from the highest horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غریق دریای محبت الله علیک فیوضات الملا الابهی و امطار الفضل من الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @love as fire, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
